title: European Union Announces New AI Regulation Framework
subtitle: Landmark legislation sets global precedent for regulating Artificial Intelligence safely.
description: The EU passes landmark legislation defining the future of Artificial Intelligence usage.
fullArticle:
In a historic move, the European Parliament has approved the AI Act, a comprehensive set of rules aimed at governing artificial intelligence systems based on their risk to society. This legislation makes the EU the first major global player to formalize AI regulations.

Understanding the Risk Tiers

The framework divides AI systems into four tiers: Unacceptable risk, High risk, Limited risk, and Minimal risk. Systems deemed an 'unacceptable risk', such as social scoring systems, will be outright banned.

Tech industry leaders have expressed mixed reactions, balancing the need for safety with concerns over stifling innovation in the European tech sector.
author: Elena Rossi
imageCaption: Abstract representation of Artificial Intelligence inside a digital framework.
seoDescription: Full details on the European Union's new Artificial Intelligence Act and what it means for global tech.
